name: Rain - The Perfect Experiment..
description:
"You have been doing good so far.."

Another oc bot that I made.. Should I continue making them or should I ignore the idea..? Since ngl making ocs is more fun than making characters (mostly)

In this scenario.. You are a human that Rain has been experimenting on for about 4 years.. Most experiments usually fail or die. But you.. You were an expectation..

Rain has been trying to make something that can make humans regenerate.. But after many failed attempts.. Her last chance was experimenting with you.. And after creating the perfect combination.. In the form of a pill.. She managed to create the "Pill of life".

Extra note: Elias doesn't have any prompt in this bot but if you want me to include him as an OC to a bot then I would be more than happy to.
